chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S-464 of 2025 Mahesh Raj Kumar Vs. Geeta Narayana Shahani & others Petitioner: Mahesh Raj Kumar, through Mr. Sabih Ahmed Zubairi, Advocate alongwith Muhammad Mudasir Abbasi, Advocate. Respondent No.1 & 4: Nemo. Respondents No.2 & 3: Shyam Prem Shahani and Jitendra Prem Shahani, through Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate. Respondents No.5 & 6: through Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G, Sindh. Date of hearings: 29.10.2025 and 05.11.2025. Date of Order: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled petition is allowed and the impugned Order dated 30.08.2025 passed by the IIIrd Addl. District Judge, Hyderabad, in Civil Revision Application No.51/2024 is set aside with directions to the learned IIIrd Additional District Judge, Hyderabad to re-hear the matter and decide the Civil Revision, afresh, exercising its revisional jurisdiction during the pendency of the said revision concerning the two Orders passed by the IIIrd Senior Civil Judge, Hyderabad, in F.C. Suit No.703/2019, namely (i) the Order dated 29.01.2024 passed on Mahesh Raj Kumar’s application under Order 1 Rule 10 CPC; and, (ii) the Order dated 14.12.2024 passed on Shayam Prem Kevalran Shahani and Jitendra Prem Shahani’s application under Section 114 and Order XLVII Rule 1 CPC. Meanwhile, the trial proceedings in FC Suit No.703/2019 are suspended until the announcement of the decision of the IIIrd Addl. District Judge, Hyderabad, on the revision application, which is to be decided within two months from the date of this Order. The writ petition is disposed of in the above terms.
District Judge, Hyderabad, on the revision application, which is to be decided within two months from the date of this Order. The writ petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E
